content.en:
At the beginning, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others agreed to the cooperation of the Venerable, but they were actually forced to be helpless, once they did not agree, they would 100% die in the great destruction of the universe.

If you say yes, there is still hope for transcendence.

If the Venerable One continued to help them, their hope would be even greater, but now they knew that the Venerable One was not sincere in helping them to transcend at all, otherwise they would not have sent the Earth-Honorable Powerhouse of the Tibetan God Organization to reincarnate in.

However, they did not dare to return, and even in this situation, it was useless to regret it.

They could sense that half of the Chaos Arcana and the half of the Cangyu Universe had gradually begun to merge, and the Universe Origin could not break free from the suppression of the Chaos Arcana at all.

In other words, they have no way to break the plan.

Not long ago, when they learned about this, they also knew that they and the others had completely lost their qualifications to cooperate with that Venerable, and they tried to contact that Venerable One, but there was no response.

They were abandoned!

"I'm on my own!"

The Lord of the Ancient Beings secretly said.

......

Kirin Hall.

As soon as Ye Tian came in, the Qilin Palace's instrument spirit appeared.

"Assessor, I am the instrument spirit of the Qilin Palace, the Qilin Hall is the inheritance place left by a hegemon-level powerhouse of Chaos, and I need to enter one world after another and kill the fierce beasts in the world......"

The machine spirit said a lot, but Ye Tian had already obtained information from the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and the two said the same.

Soon, the machine spirit finished speaking.

"I'm going to enter the first world!"

Ye Tiandao.

"In the first world, you need to kill ten fierce beasts of the Human Venerable Realm, and the time is one day!"

The machine spirit spoke.

Renzun is a realm in the chaos, equivalent to the realm of the master of this universe, the first world is not difficult, it can even be said to be very simple, and some powerful masters have hope to complete it.

Wow!

Ye Tian was teleported into the first world.

The first world, a mountain range.

Ye Tian appeared here and felt the situation in this world.

"The Chaos Vitality is very strong, the area is very large, and the Life Heavenly Pupil can almost cover the entire world, which is equivalent to the size of a galaxy in the outside world. There are a lot of fierce beasts, but each fierce beast basically occupies a territory, and there is no fierce beast race!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It wouldn't take a day to kill ten beasts, but if he wanted to gather some resources, a day was not much.

Swish!

Ye Tian used his Constant Light Divine Power to escape to the nearest fierce beast of the Human Venerable Realm.

Soon, he reached his destination.

The copy talent was swept away, and the talent of this Terran realm fierce beast appeared in his sight.

Talent Identification
Beast: Blood Kirk
Bloodline Talent: Chao Level
Defense Talent: God-level
Speed Talent: God-level

Strength Talents: Arcanon

Blood Explosion Talent: God-level

Blood Pupil Talent: God-level

......

"Die!"

Ye Tian used the power of space and pressed it lightly, and this blood wolf was instantly wiped out and turned into a cloud of blood mist.

Although this Blood Qiwolf Fierce Beast is weak, it is also a small lord, and there are also a lot of elixirs, spiritual roots, and rare ore resources here.

So, Ye Tian took a little time to collect these resources.

Next, Ye Tian continued to collect resources.

Unlike the others, he doesn't need to hunt for beasts, and because of his speed, he can collect resources countless times faster in the first world than others.

In just one day, if the Lord of the Yuan Gu came here, it was estimated that it would be difficult to find too many treasures, after all, this world suppressed the divine consciousness of the powerful people of the universe, and it was difficult to explore too many areas.

This is very normal, because in the chaos, the scope of exploration of the divine consciousness of the Earth Venerable powerhouse is not large, and it is impossible for the divine consciousness to sweep through a star field in an instant like the universe.

Soon, the day is approaching.

At this time, inside Ye Tian's small universe, there was a star full of elixirs and various rare resources, although the grade was not high, but if the value of these resources was accumulated, it was enough to make the first-class supreme heart move.

"It's a small bonus!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although he collected a lot of resources, he didn't actually kill 10 fierce beasts, only killed 9 fierce beasts, and the other fierce beasts were just suppressed by him, not killed.

Because once he kills 10 fierce beasts, he will be teleported to the second world, and there will be no way to continue collecting resources.

This is a loophole in the Qilin Palace, everyone can use this loophole to collect resources, and it is also a loophole allowed by the Qilin Palace.

At the end of the day, Ye Tian killed a human venerable beast and completed the assessment of the first world.

Wow!

Ye Tian was teleported to the second world.

In the second world, he needed to kill ten fierce beasts of the five-star Earth Venerable realm, and this level was not too easy for some weaker supremes, because the strongest level in the second world was not a five-star Earth Venerable Beast, but also a six- or seven-star Earth Venerable level fierce beast.

Once the aura is exposed, it is very likely that they will be besieged and killed by other fierce beasts.

Because this world is very resistant to outsiders, once it is discovered, it is to besiege and kill, and the first world of human venerable beasts is too weak, and the speed is limited, and the territory is too large, so it is difficult to besiege and kill the assessor.

Of course, the second world is not difficult for Ye Tian.

Ye Tian also collected a large number of resources according to the method of the first world.

The only pity is that there is still only one day.

In terms of harvest, the harvest of the second world is far greater than that of the first world, because the resources of the second world are more precious, and there are even many resources that can improve the strength of the Supreme.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to the third world.

In the third world, Ye Tian needs to kill ten eight-star earthly venerable beasts, which is equivalent to killing ten third-class supremes, and there are also a small number of ten-star earthly beasts in the third world, if the speed is not fast enough, maybe he will be surrounded by ten-star earthly beasts before he has killed ten eight-star earthly venerables.

Therefore, the original Lord of the Yuan Gu could only quickly complete the third world, and did not dare to collect resources, otherwise he would inevitably fail.

And Ye Tian's strength is strong, so he is naturally not afraid of the fierce beasts of this mere strength of the earth, but wantonly collects resources.

The day passed.

"402 top-grade elixirs, 25 of which can improve the cultivation talent, so that the chaos-level cultivation talent can be upgraded to a mixed-level cultivation talent, if it is used well, it is enough for the human race to give birth to some more supremes!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course, in addition to elixirs, there are also many ores that can be used to forge the strongest treasure.

The harvest in the third world is equivalent to hundreds of supreme treasures.

"Enter the Fourth World!"

Ye Tiandao.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as the fourth world entered, Ye Tian frowned slightly after probing.

"The fourth world needs to kill 10 nine-star Earth Venerable Beasts, but most of these fourth worlds are ten-star Earth Venerable Beasts, and there are also two one-star God Beasts with combat power, no wonder the Lord of the Yuan Gu will fail!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu didn't say much about the situation in the fourth world before, only that there were a lot of fierce beasts with first-class supreme combat power here, that is, the Ten Star Earth Venerable.

But now, he knew it.

In the fourth world, which is full of ten-star earthly venerable beasts, it is difficult to find a nine-star earthly venerable beast, and you will basically encounter a ten-star earthly beast with combat power. Once he encountered one, with the strength of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, there was no way to kill a ten-star Earth Venerable Beast in a short period of time. And the battle together, the other ten-star earth venerable beasts rushed over, and it was impossible for the Lord of the Yuan Gu not to fail!

"The fourth world is not very big, there are not many fierce beasts, it seems that with the foundation of the Qilin Palace, it is difficult to cultivate too many powerful fierce beasts. In any case, the resources of this world are definitely more precious, and maybe I can find some resources that can improve my strength!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he found the first ten-star Earth Venerable Beast.

As for the assessment task, he is not in a hurry to complete it!
